scripts.build: pnpm --filter @addzero/admin-shell build && pnpm --filter @addzero/api-client build && pnpm --filter @addzero/remote-ui build && pnpm --filter msc-aio-web build && pnpm --filter remote-desktop-web build
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm --filter msc-aio-desktop build && pnpm --filter remote-desktop-desktop build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @addzero/admin-shell lint && pnpm --filter @addzero/api-client lint && pnpm --filter @addzero/remote-ui lint && pnpm --filter msc-aio-web lint && pnpm --filter remote-desktop-web lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @addzero/admin-shell test && pnpm --filter @addzero/api-client test && pnpm --filter @addzero/remote-ui test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @addzero/admin-shell typecheck && pnpm --filter @addzero/api-client typecheck && pnpm --filter @addzero/remote-ui typecheck && pnpm --filter msc-aio-web typecheck && pnpm --filter remote-desktop-web typecheck
